titleStmt.title: SII 41.202: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 202. (A.R. No. 420 of 1905.) Guḍimallūr, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Bhūmīśvara temple at Guḍimallūr.

summary.p: Registers a remission of taxes by the chief in favor of all the temples (palataḷi) at Karaivaḻi-Kalavaip paṟṟu from his seventh, Year, as those temples were experiencing difficulty to conduct worship until the sixth, Year. The remission order is addressed to the nāṭṭār of Kalavaippaṟṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakaloka cakkaravatti Irāca nārāyaṇan campuvarāyan kalavaip paṟṟu nāṭṭārkku taṅkaḷ paṟṟil karaivaḻi kalavaippaṟṟil palataḷi pūcaippātikku koḷḷum vari Āṟāvatu varaiyum koṇṭaittāle pūcaiyum samārātanaiyum tiruppaṇiyum naṭavātapaṭiyāle Eḻāvatu mutalukku
Aḷaveṟṟam Uḷppaṭa pūcaippāti Uḷḷa nilattukkuk koḷḷum vari kaḻittu Im mutal pūcaikkum camārātanaikkum tiruppaṇikkum kuṭutta Aḷavukku tānattārkku Eṟa pūcaippātiyāl Uḷḷa nilam Aḷavueṟṟam Uḷppaṭa pātiyākap pakuntu kuṭuttu sarvvamānyaya Iṟaiiliyāka cantirātittavaraiyum cella kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttut tāḻvaṟa naṭattippotavum coṉṉom .
Digital edition of SII 41.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
